character.name: 전사
character.prompt:
Create one game-ready female warrior pixel sprite using the two reference images with strictly separated purposes.

Use the first reference image only for sprite proportions, character scale, front-facing idle pose, pixel density, silhouette readability, and classic Korean MMORPG sprite presentation. Do not use the first reference image for class identity, hair color, clothing design, robe design, floating spirits, magical effects, or color palette.

Use the second reference image only for the warrior’s class identity, dark-fantasy mood, armor design, black hair, dark steel materials, deep crimson cloth accents, leather equipment, and practical one-handed longsword.

Create a single handcrafted pixel sprite in a classic Korean MMORPG style with strong Ragnarok Online-inspired readability. Exact canvas size is 64×88 pixels. Transparent background only. One character only. Full body visible from the top of the hair to the bottom of the boots. Character height should be approximately 80 to 84 pixels, centered with a small transparent margin. No floor, no background, no shadow, no text, no UI, no frame, and no extra objects.

The character is a slim, serious female dark-fantasy warrior. She has a calm and disciplined expression, a clean readable silhouette, and a restrained heroic presence. Her proportions should match a classic Korean MMORPG sprite: approximately 3.5 heads tall, with a large but balanced head, slim compact torso, narrow shoulders, short and slender arms and legs, small hands, and small boots. Keep the body elegant and slightly narrow rather than thick or bulky.

Use a front-facing idle pose with a very slight three-quarter nuance. One leg should rest slightly forward, creating a subtle natural stance. One arm should remain relaxed, and the other should hold a practical longsword downward close to the body. The pose must remain calm and readable, not exaggerated, not dynamic, and not in an attack motion.

Her hair must be long natural black hair falling below the shoulders. The hair must remain clearly black at sprite scale, using only near-black, charcoal-black, dark neutral brown, and muted gray highlights. Do not interpret the hair as purple, violet, lavender, magenta, blue-purple, silver, white, pastel, or any other bright or cool fantasy hair color. The character must not inherit the pale or purple-tinted feeling of the first reference image.

Her armor should be inspired by the second reference image: dark weathered steel, blackened iron, and deep crimson cloth accents. Use a fitted dark breastplate, one medium reinforced shoulder plate, slim armored forearms, fitted leg armor, a practical belt, small leather pouches, and plated boots. Add a short restrained crimson waist cloth or torn dark crimson half-mantle for identity, but keep it compact and readable. The armor should feel practical, medieval, and dark-fantasy, not decorative, not overdesigned, and not too wide. Avoid oversized shoulder pads, giant capes, giant cloth masses, or excessive small details that reduce readability at small sprite size.

Use a limited palette with near-black hair, charcoal, dark steel gray, aged iron gray, muted silver highlights, deep blood-crimson cloth, and dark brown leather. Keep the palette controlled and readable. Do not use purple tones anywhere in the design, including the hair, shadow colors, or cloth shading. Do not use bright saturated colors.

The weapon should be a practical medieval longsword with a straight narrow blade, simple guard, and dark leather grip. It should be normal in size, held downward at one side, fully contained within the canvas, and easy to read at small scale. Do not make it a giant sword, glowing weapon, or magical weapon.

The final result should be a clean, sprite-ready, high-readability female warrior pixel character for a classic Korean MMORPG, clearly distinct from a summoner, mage, priest, or robed class. She must look like a dark-fantasy swordswoman with black hair, dark steel armor, restrained crimson accents, and a practical longsword, rendered as a compact 64×88 transparent-background pixel sprite with crisp hard pixel edges, controlled pixel clusters, and no smooth painted rendering.
